criteria.name: Mermaid Diagram Syntax Validity
criteria.description: The Mermaid diagram in c1-context.md passes validation in mermaid-cli (mmdc) without errors or warnings, and renders in a standard Mermaid live editor without console errors.

criteria.name: C4 Level 1 Completeness
criteria.description: Diagram contains exactly: 1 system box (llm-switch), 2 people boxes (developer, operations), and minimum 6 external system boxes (Nomad, Consul, Vault, local models, frontier APIs, monitoring tools). No container boxes or component boxes permitted at C1 level.

criteria.name: Relationship Specification
criteria.description: Every external system has at least one labeled relationship arrow connecting to llm-switch, specifying protocol (e.g., gRPC, HTTP) and direction. No unlabeled connections permitted.

criteria.name: Narrative Section Requirements
criteria.description: Markdown file contains exactly four sections: System Context (min 150 words), User Roles (min 100 words), External Dependencies (min 100 words), and Key Interactions (min 150 words). Each section must use H2 headers.

criteria.name: PRD Traceability
criteria.description: Every diagram element (system, person, external system) and every narrative statement about requirements includes a comment or footnote referencing the specific PRD section number (e.g., [PRD-3.2]).

criteria.name: Technology Stack Compliance
criteria.description: Narrative explicitly lists: Golang, Docker, Nomad, Consul, Vault, vLLM, langfuse. Diagram uses correct C4 shapes (hexagon for system, person for users, rectangle for external systems). No other technology boxes permitted in diagram.

criteria.name: Edge Case Coverage
criteria.description: Narrative explicitly addresses: (1) zero-code-change integration pattern with existing applications, (2) handling of multiple model types (local vs frontier), (3) Nomad cluster deployment constraints, (4) API timeout scenarios, (5) network partition tolerance.

criteria.name: File Structure Integrity
criteria.description: File begins with H1 title 'C1 System Context', followed immediately by Mermaid diagram block (```mermaid...```), followed by narrative sections. No extraneous text before diagram.

criteria.name: Label Consistency
criteria.description: All labels in the Mermaid diagram match exactly (case-sensitive) with terms used in the narrative section. No abbreviation discrepancies permitted.
